tracks.title: 🎸 Delta Blues Roots — Mississippi Soul 2026 | Raw Electric Blues | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
Raw electric delta blues from the Mississippi delta. Slide guitar, harmonica, stomping rhythm. The roots of all modern music.

#DeltaBlues #ElectricBlues #MississippiBlues #BluesMusic #AssiremMusicProd #2026

tracks.suno_exclude_styles: pop, house, trap, reggae, K-pop, country pop
tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Woke up this morning, river rising high
Woke up this morning, river rising high
Delta blues on my mind, ain't gonna say goodbye

[Verse 2]
Slide guitar crying, harmonica moan
Mississippi soul, this is my home

[Chorus]
Delta blues, rolling through my veins
Delta blues, washing out the pain
From the levee to the crossroads
This old music still remains

[Verse 3]
Travelled down to the crossroads at midnight
Got the blues in my hands and the devil in my sight

[Harmonica break]

[Outro]
Mississippi... rolling... always rolling...
